customColumn2.isDisabled: {{(() => { const tableData = table_overview.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => ( currentRow.status === "blocked" )) :  currentRow.status === "blocked"  })()}}
customColumn2.label: Ações
customColumn2.buttonLabel:
{{(() => { const tableData = table_overview.processedTableData || []; return tableData.length > 0 ? tableData.map((currentRow, currentIndex) => ( 
  currentRow.status === "blocked" ? "-" : 
  currentRow.status === "pending" ? "Enviar segunda via" : 
  currentRow.status === "active" ? "Bloquear" : 
  currentRow.status === "expired" ? "Ativar" : "Ação"
 + 'Action')) :  
  currentRow.status === "blocked" ? "-" : 
  currentRow.status === "pending" ? "Enviar segunda via" : 
  currentRow.status === "active" ? "Bloquear" : 
  currentRow.status === "expired" ? "Ativar" : "Ação"
 + 'Action' })()}}
